Time-varying tau mapping between two covariate patterns

Source: R/translate.R
translate_time2.Rd

Returns tau(t), defined by H0(t) = H1(tau(t)), i.e. the time at which the comparison group has accumulated the same cumulative hazard as the reference group at time t. Requires rstpm2.

Usage

translate_time2(fit, covariate0, covariate1, time)

Arguments

fit

A fitted model object from fit_genhaz().

covariate0

Numeric vector: covariate pattern for the reference group.

covariate1

Numeric vector: covariate pattern for the comparison group.

time

Numeric vector of evaluation time points.

Value

Data frame with columns time and tvta (tau values).

On this page
